_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing matching and merging rules for entity resolution, including rule documentation, threshold calibration, and exception handling workflows.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.363), AI-S-011 (AI, cosine: 0.362).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.291). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [expressions, regular] vs WIDAI-only terms [calibration, designing, documentation, entity, exception, handling] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.896, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in regular expressions" and "Skill in designing matching and merging rules for entity resolution, including r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.384 > STS 0.291 (gap +0.094). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [expressions, regular]. WIDAI-only: [calibration, designing, documentation, entity, exception, handling].
